digest_queue.title: Rocket Lab signs new launch contracts and acquires robotics company during Q1 2026
digest_queue.resumo_pt: Resumo (PT-BR): Rocket Lab signs new launch contracts and acquires robotics company during Q1 2026 by Sean Yoder May 14, 2026 written by Sean Yoder May 14, 2026 1 Rocket Lab opened 2026 by breaking every record it set in 2025. The company signed more launch contracts in three months than it flew missions in all of last year, completed the acquisition of laser communications firm Mynaric AG, entered into a definitive agreement to acquire space robotics company Motiv Space Systems, introduced a new electric satellite thruster, and was selected alongside Raytheon to demonstrate capabilities for the U.S.

digest_queue.title: SpaceX scrubs first launch attempt of its Starship Version 3 rocket
digest_queue.resumo_pt: Resumo (PT-BR): SpaceX scrubs first launch attempt of its Starship Version 3 rocket May 21, 2026 Will Robinson-Smith SpaceX scrubbed the planned launch of its Starship-Super Heavy rocket on the Flight 12 mission on May 21, 2026. EDT (0003 UTC): SpaceX scrubbed the mission after dipping in and out of multiple holds at T-minus 40 seconds.
